name: i-robot
description: Isaac Asimov's I, Robot — the classic collection of robot stories that introduced the Three Laws of Robotics, exploring ethics, consciousness, and the evolution of intelligence.
useCase: Understanding the Three Laws, logical paradoxes, AI consciousness, technology ethics, human-robot relationships, evolution of intelligence.
knownRisks: The book is fiction, not engineering — the Three Laws are not a real AI safety framework
The stories reflect the 1950s context (gender roles, technology assumptions)
Asimov's robots are human-like — modern AI is very different
